'''Greelossk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] inmate who lived in [[Desolation Alley]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was serving a life sentence for committing high crimes against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but he was also wanted dead by an unknown being for committing personal crimes. This bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
